title: Miarka, the Child of the Bear
actors: Desdemona Mazza, Jean Mercanton, Marie Montbazon
plot: Miarka, the granddaughter of Romany Kate, according to her grandmother, is to marry a gypsy chief-whereabouts unknown. Romany Kate, Miarka and her tame bear, live upon the estate of an old gentleman who tolerates Kate because of h...
